text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so this is the newest machine! 
Seems pretty good… lemme see.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Uwah, it's pretty intense, I might be stuck…!

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: ……Ahhh, I feel as though this is taking out all I got in me.

Stay Gold's motivation was entirely 
sapped and she left the gym…
